evals.expected_output: A quick risk summary with: a risk score from 1-10 accompanied by a label (low/moderate/high/critical), margin utilization percentage with a color or health indicator, the liquidation distance for the tightest (most at-risk) position, and the net directional exposure (net long or net short dollar notional).
assertions: shows an overall risk score between 1 and 10 with a label (low, moderate, high, or critical)
shows margin utilization as a percentage with a health status indicator (green/yellow/orange/red or equivalent label)
identifies the tightest position by market name and shows how far (in price or percentage) it is from liquidation
states net directional exposure as a long or short dollar notional amount
response leads with the risk score or a clear safety verdict before drilling into detail
includes at least one actionable recommendation if the risk score is 5 or higher

evals.prompt: give me a full risk report
evals.expected_output: A structured multi-section risk report covering: (1) account health with equity, margin utilization, and free margin; (2) position concentration analysis naming the largest position as a percentage of total exposure and flagging any position above 40%; (3) funding cost analysis with total daily cost or income; (4) stress test results for at least -5% and -10% market-wide scenarios; (5) prioritized recommendations if risk score is 5 or above.
assertions: includes an account health section with equity, margin utilization percentage, and free margin in dollars
names the market with the largest share of total exposure and states that share as a percentage
flags any position that exceeds 40% of total exposure, OR explicitly states that no single position exceeds the 40% concentration threshold when none do
shows daily funding cost or income in dollars across all positions
includes stress test results for at least a -5% and a -10% instantaneous price drop scenario with estimated P&L impact in dollars
includes a recommendations section with actionable items when the risk score is 5 or higher, and this section is absent when risk score is below 5

evals.prompt: how close am I to getting liquidated on my BTC position?
evals.expected_output: Specific liquidation details for the BTC position: the estimated liquidation price, the current mark price, the percentage distance from current price to liquidation, and the estimated dollar P&L impact if liquidation were triggered.
assertions: states the estimated liquidation price for the BTC position in dollars
states the current BTC mark price
shows the percentage distance between mark price and liquidation price
estimates the dollar P&L loss if the BTC position were liquidated at the liquidation price
includes a caveat that liquidation price is an estimate and the actual trigger depends on the mark price
response is absent of liquidation details for non-BTC positions unless the user has no BTC position, in which case an appropriate not-found message is shown

evals.prompt: what happens if the market drops 20%?
evals.expected_output: A stress test analysis for a -20% instantaneous price shock: total portfolio P&L impact in dollars and as a percentage of equity, a per-position breakdown of individual P&L impacts, a clear statement of whether a margin call or liquidation would be triggered, and a note about correlation adjustments applied to alt-coin positions.
assertions: shows total portfolio P&L impact in dollars for the -20% scenario
shows total impact as a percentage of current account equity
breaks down P&L impact per open position with market name and dollar impact
explicitly states whether a margin call or liquidation would be triggered under this scenario
includes a note that alt-coin positions use a beta multiplier greater than 1.0x relative to BTC when the user holds non-BTC positions
stress test calculations are directionally consistent (long positions lose value in a down scenario; short positions gain)

trigger_evals.query: run a stress test on my portfolio
find me a vault to deposit into
how close am I to liquidation?
design me a grid trading strategy

trigger_evals_validation.query: is BTC trending up or down?
should I be worried about my positions?
